SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Interface BookmarkHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultBookmarkHandler
public interface BookmarkHandler
The interface that defines a bookmark handler.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addBookmark(String displayName, URL uri)
    addBookmark() returns true if a new bookmark is added.
    void
    editBookmarks()
    Bring up some kind of editor for the user to manage bookmarks.
    int
    getBookmarkCount()
     
    GemLink
    getBookmarkLink(int index)
     
    boolean
    isBookmarked(URL uri)
    isBookmark() returns true if the URI is definitely bookmarked, and false if not, or uncertain.
    void
    showBookmarks()
    Bring up some kind of list of all bookmarks for the user.

  • Method Details

    • isBookmarked

      boolean isBookmarked(URL uri)
      isBookmark() returns true if the URI is definitely bookmarked, and false if not, or uncertain. This method throws no exceptions.

    • addBookmark

      boolean addBookmark(String displayName, URL uri) throws IOException
      addBookmark() returns true if a new bookmark is added. The only reason not to add the bookmark -- other than exception -- is that the URI is already bookmarked.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • editBookmarks

      void editBookmarks() throws IOException
      Bring up some kind of editor for the user to manage bookmarks.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • getBookmarkCount

      int getBookmarkCount()

    • getBookmarkLink

      GemLink getBookmarkLink(int index)

    • showBookmarks

      void showBookmarks() throws IOException
      Bring up some kind of list of all bookmarks for the user.
      Throws:
      IOException
